creator: Alexander88207@protonmail.com
text:
Hello,

i can remember that screen sharing worked very well all the time, now out of a sudden it doesnt work anymore.

I guess that an update may can have introduced that but i don't have the resources to confirm that.

This problem is not site specific, so when i try it on discord or onlinescreenshare.com then it crashes immediately.

I do use FreeBSD 14.0 BETA2 using Metacity (x11) with amdgpu and xf86-video-amdgpu.

firefox
ATTENTION: default value of option mesa_glthread overridden by environment.
